item.title: KredosAI raises $7M, led by BMW’s venture arm, to use AI to help companies collect late payments
item.description: KredosAI, an Issaquah startup founded by former T-Mobile executives, raised $7 million led by BMW i Ventures for its AI platform that helps companies collect overdue payments while keeping customers. The round brings its total funding to a little over $10 million. Read More

item.title: Gradial raises $65M as startup sees rapid growth around agentic tools for enterprise marketing
item.description: Gradial says it's raised over $110 million in the past 16 months, calling it "a testament to the rapid growth" it's seen across its business. Read More

item.title: Devplan raises $2.5M to take on the product coordination work that AI coding is leaving behind
item.description: Devplan, a Seattle startup building software to coordinate product and engineering work, is emerging from stealth with $2.5 million in seed funding led by AI2 Incubator. Read More

item.title: Seattle biotech heavy-hitters emerge from stealth with $46M for next-gen migraine treatments
item.description: Vedana Therapeutics emerged from stealth with a $46M Series A. Led by local biotech veterans, the Seattle startup is developing next-gen, at-home migraine injections. Read More

item.title: Selling sunshine from Seattle: Solius raises $23M to launch new at-home light-therapy device
item.description: Founded in 2013, Bainbridge Island, Wash.-based Solius Labs received FDA clearance for its $2,995 Solius Pro, a device which calculates and delivers a personalized dose of UVB light. Read More

item.title: With $54M and a SpaceX playbook, Seattle’s Endurance races to tap deep-sea volcanic power
item.description: With $54M and a SpaceX playbook, Seattle's Endurance races to tap deep-sea volcanic power Read More

item.title: Ex-Icertis executives raise $7.5M for Rivvun, a startup that recovers lost corporate cash
item.description: Two former executives from enterprise software giant Icertis have teamed up to launch a new Seattle startup aimed at a multi-trillion-dollar corporate headache. Read More

item.title: Find it, fix it: Seattle startup Emphere raises $2.1M to automate software vulnerability patching
item.description: Emphere, a Seattle startup that emerged from the AI2 Incubator, raised $2.1 million in pre-seed funding to automatically fix vulnerabilities found in popular open-source distributions, catering to software companies that sell to regulated industries. Read More

item.title: Helion hits $15.5B valuation with $465M in new cash as it aims to commercialize fusion this decade
item.description: Helion is chasing the highly ambitious goal of becoming the first company to commercialize fusion energy. They already have a high-stakes agreement to supply power to a Microsoft data center by 2028 and have broken ground on a power plant. Read More

item.title: ‘Biometrics for things’: Alitheon raises $8M to expand its optical AI tech to ID physical objects
item.description: The Bellevue startup's funding will accelerate its FeaturePrint technology, which uses optical AI to create a unique digital "fingerprint" for physical objects — no barcodes, tags, or labels required. Read More

item.title: Version One Ventures raises fresh capital for early bets on AI, robotics and deep tech
item.description: The firm announced that it closed Version One Fund V, a $78 million fund focused on pre-seed and seed investments, along with Opportunities Fund III, a $30 million fund designed to make follow-on investments in its most promising portfolio companies. Read More

item.title: CodeIntegrity raises $5M to put permanent guardrails on unpredictable AI agents
item.description: While companies rush to deploy autonomous AI tools, CodeIntegrity has raised new funding to build runtime guardrails needed to keep unpredictable models from leaking sensitive enterprise data. The startup's co-founders recently relocated from the Seattle area to San Francisco. Read More

item.title: Cowboy Space raises $275M as it seeks 40-60 employees for new satellite and rocket hub in Seattle
item.description: Of its 41 open positions, 18 are based in Seattle, spanning roles in avionics, mechanical engineering, spacecraft design, and software. Read More

item.title: Anduril lands $5B as defense giant builds autonomous warship operation in Seattle
item.description: Anduril, which has established operations along the Lake Washington Ship Canal, said the financing will fuel aggressive investments in manufacturing capacity, R&D and infrastructure needed to produce advanced defense systems. Read More
